utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Alright , alright , alright . It is been fourteen and a half minutes and you still have not said one word . Oh God , do something . Just make contact , smile !

emotion_cause.span: 1_It is been fourteen and a half minutes and you still have not said one word .

utterances.speaker: Jill
utterances.text: Would you like to call somebody ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yeah , about 300 guys I went to high school with .
